message:
fix: Add tokio sync feature to resolve Rust crate compilation errors

Fixed cargo install compilation failure by adding missing "sync" feature
to tokio dependency. This enables tokio::sync::{mpsc, RwLock} required
by MCP SSE transport implementation.

Changes:
- Added "sync" to tokio features in Cargo.toml line 47
- Verified native build: cargo build --release --features native ✅
- Verified CLI binary: cargo build --bin jj-agent-hook --features native,cli ✅
- Verified WASM build: cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --features wasm ✅

Resolves:
  error[E0432]: unresolved imports tokio::sync::mpsc, tokio::sync::RwLock
  error[E0603]: module sync is private

This fixes the critical 0% functional Rust crate issue. Users can now
successfully run: cargo install agentic-jujutsu

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
